hook.summary: A woman demonstrates Sudoku logic on a physical whiteboard.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a green shirt marks red 'X's on a whiteboard Sudoku grid to show excluded cells.
hook.text_overlay: The numbers on the right exclude six possible cells
hook.voiceover_transcript: The numbers on the right exclude six possible cells

scene_flow: A woman explains Sudoku logic by marking 'X's on a whiteboard grid to eliminate possibilities.
She demonstrates how to find a hidden single by excluding cells in a 3x3 block using surrounding numbers.
She repeats the logic for a second block, applying row and column constraints to find the next number.
The video transitions to a clean end card featuring the Sudoku.com logo and app icon.
on_screen_text: The numbers on the right exclude six possible cells
and the numbers under this block exclude two more
We're left with one free cell
Here two rows and columns already contain 7
So another goes to this cell
audience_proxy: Puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers who enjoy brain-teasing logic challenges and clear instructional content.
